_comment: V3 §5 ApiGatekeeper egress governance (BRIEF §5.3 peer-MCP HTTP, §5.5 Gmail). The single ApiGatekeeper.execute() routes EVERY outbound API call through a per-channel token-bucket + a FIFO overflow queue (no crash on burst), and logs every call. Versioned + git-tracked (no secrets here; tokens live in .env).

prefect_deploy._use: Stage-2 cloud deploy / status API calls (§8)
